basic_details.job_title: IIT Jammu Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Jammu (IIT Jammu)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Jammu (IIT Jammu) Research Associate Notification 2026 has been released on 07 May 2026 on the official website of IIT Jammu. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Jammu Research Associate Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable up to 5 years for SC/ST/OBC/women and physically handicapped candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in the relevant or allied discipline with B.E./B.Tech.
qualification.details: Ph.D. in the relevant or allied discipline, with B.E./B.Tech. In Electronic Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering (ECE), or Computer Engineering with Sensors Technology from a recognized University/Institute. Prior experience of having completed one research project (Desirable). Four research publications in a peer-reviewed journal as First author (Desirable).

selection_process: Shortlisting based on merit and project needs Interview (online/offline)
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Jammu to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Jammu Research Associate Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Jammu Research Associate (RA) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the IIT Jammu Research Associate (RA) position is 30th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. in a relevant or allied discipline, along with a B.E./B.Tech. in Electronic Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering (ECE), or Computer Engineering with Sensors Technology.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Research Associate post is 35 years. Age relaxation is provided for SC/ST/OBC/women and physically handicapped candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. ₹49,000/- per month, plus House Rent Allowance (HRA) as applicable.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Research Associate (RA) position at IIT Jammu.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates are required to apply online through the official IIT Jammu website.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the IIT Jammu Research Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Research Associate role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on merit and project requirements, followed by an interview, which can be conducted online or offline.

faq.question: Q9. Does IIT Jammu offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, IIT Jammu offers an age relaxation of up to 5 years for candidates belonging to SC/ST/OBC categories, as well as for women and physically handicapped individuals.

faq.question: Q10. What are the desirable qualifications for the Research Associate position?
faq.answer: Desirable qualifications include prior experience of completing one research project and having four research publications in peer-reviewed journals as the first author.
